mapper.sql: tenant_id, definition_id, source_system, task_type, display_name, description, domain, risk_level, default_severity, owner_team, status, version, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, mapping_id, source_system, object_type, event_type, error_code, message_pattern, task_type, capability_code, priority, is_active, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, profile_id, profile_code, profile_name, agent_type, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, description, allowed_task_types_json::text as allowed_task_types_json, allowed_issue_providers_json::text as allowed_issue_providers_json, required_runtime_features_json::text as required_runtime_features_json, tool_policy, risk_level_limit, requires_certification, requires_human_approval, is_active, policy_version, effective_at, expires_at, renewal_required_before_days, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, capability_id, capability_code, capability_name, category, capability_type, domain, resource_type, operation, data_class, service_level, legacy_task_coupling, migration_status, description, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, risk_level, status, version, owner_team, requires_approval, requires_certification, requires_runtime_probe, is_dispatch_eligible, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, binding_id, profile_code, capability_code, capability_name, binding_mode, is_required, is_active, priority, approval_status, condition_expr, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, assignment_id, agent_id, capability_code, capability_name, status, source, requested_by, requested_at, approved_by, approved_at, revoked_by, revoked_at, expires_at, evidence_ref, reason, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, policy_id, policy_code, policy_name, description, owner_team, risk_level, status, version, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, scope_id, policy_code, source_system, task_type, task_definition_id, risk_level, priority, condition_expr, is_active, priority_order, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, capability_code, capability_name, required_mode, min_version, condition_expr, is_blocking, priority, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, feature_code, feature_name, trust_status, condition_expr, is_blocking, priority, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, metric_name, operator, threshold_value, metric_window, is_blocking, score_weight, condition_expr, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, factor_name, weight, direction, condition_expr, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, metric_id, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, supply_profile_id, null::varchar as profile_code, metric_window, window_start, window_end, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, calculated_at, source, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, metric_id, metric_date, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, supply_profile_id, null::varchar as profile_code, 'daily'::varchar as metric_window, null::timestamptz as window_start, metric_date::timestamptz as window_end, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, updated_at as calculated_at, 'DAILY'::varchar as source, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, metric_id, metric_date, null::varchar as agent_id, runtime_id, null::varchar as binding_id, null::varchar as supply_profile_id, null::varchar as profile_code, 'daily'::varchar as metric_window, null::timestamptz as window_start, metric_date::timestamptz as window_end, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, null::numeric as manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, updated_at as calculated_at, 'RUNTIME_DAILY'::varchar as source, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, snapshot_id, snapshot_id as metric_id, supply_profile_id, profile_code, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, metric_window, null::timestamptz as window_start, calculated_at as window_end, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, calculated_at, source, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, supply_profile_id, profile_code, profile_name, agent_id, runtime_binding_id, runtime_id, service_role, service_level, quality_grade, risk_limit, data_scope, capacity_policy, status, effective_from, expires_at, capability_snapshot_json::text as capability_snapshot_json, runtime_feature_snapshot_json::text as runtime_feature_snapshot_json, quality_snapshot_json::text as quality_snapshot_json, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, runtime_id, runtime_code, runtime_name, runtime_type, connector_type, execution_host, environment, region, zone, trust_status, status, capacity_limit, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, binding_id, agent_id, runtime_id, runtime_code, binding_status, verified_by, verified_at, approved_by, approved_at, effective_from, expires_at, capacity_limit, region, zone, data_scope, risk_limit, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, feature_id, feature_code, feature_name, category, description, status, version, requires_probe, requires_trust_approval, is_dispatch_eligible, owner_team, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, observation_id, agent_id, feature_code, feature_name, observed_value, source, probe_result, observed_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, trust_id, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, feature_code, feature_name, trust_status, source, observed_at, verified_by, verified_at, trusted_by, trusted_at, revoked_by, revoked_at, expires_at, evidence_ref, reason, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
tenant_id, binding_id, profile_code, policy_code, policy_name, binding_mode, is_required, is_active, priority, condition_expr, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

tenant_id, qualification_id, agent_id, profile_code, qualification_status, evidence_type, evidence_ref, approved_by, approved_at, expires_at, granted_policy_version, last_renewed_at, renewal_due_at, renewal_status, reason, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_task_definitions ( tenant_id, definition_id, source_system, task_type, display_name, description, domain, risk_level, default_severity, owner_team, status, version, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{definition.tenantId}, #{definition.definitionId}, #{definition.sourceSystem}, #{definition.taskType}, #{definition.displayName}, #{definition.description}, #{definition.domain}, #{definition.riskLevel}, #{definition.defaultSeverity}, #{definition.ownerTeam}, #{definition.status}, #{definition.version}, #{definition.effectiveFrom}, #{definition.retiredAt}, coalesce(cast(#{definition.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{definition.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{definition.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (definition_id) do update set source_system = excluded.source_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, display_name = excluded.display_name, description = excluded.description, domain = excluded.domain, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, default_severity = excluded.default_severity, owner_team = excluded.owner_team, status = excluded.status, version = excluded.version, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, retired_at = excluded.retired_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from dispatch_task_definitions where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and upper(source_system) = upper(#{sourceSystem}) and upper(task_type) = upper(#{taskType}) order by case status when 'ACTIVE' then 1 when 'NEEDS_REVIEW' then 2 when 'DRAFT' then 3 else 4 end, updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_event_task_mappings ( tenant_id, mapping_id, source_system, object_type, event_type, error_code, message_pattern, task_type, capability_code, priority, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{mapping.tenantId}, #{mapping.mappingId}, #{mapping.sourceSystem}, #{mapping.objectType}, #{mapping.eventType}, #{mapping.errorCode}, #{mapping.messagePattern}, #{mapping.taskType}, #{mapping.capabilityCode}, #{mapping.priority}, #{mapping.active}, coalesce(cast(#{mapping.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{mapping.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{mapping.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, mapping_id) do update set source_system = excluded.source_system, object_type = excluded.object_type, event_type = excluded.event_type, error_code = excluded.error_code, message_pattern = excluded.message_pattern, task_type = excluded.task_type, capability_code = excluded.capability_code, priority = excluded.priority, is_active = excluded.is_active, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from dispatch_event_task_mappings where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and is_active = true and upper(source_system) = upper(#{sourceSystem}) and (object_type is null or object_type = '' or object_type = '*' or object_type = 'ANY' or upper(object_type) = upper(coalesce(#{objectType}, ''))) and (event_type is null or event_type = '' or event_type = '*' or event_type = 'ANY' or upper(event_type) = upper(coalesce(#{eventType}, ''))) and (error_code is null or error_code = '' or error_code = '*' or error_code = 'ANY' or upper(error_code) = upper(coalesce(#{errorCode}, ''))) and (message_pattern is null or message_pattern = '' or message_pattern = '*' or upper(coalesce(#{message}, '')) like '%' || upper(message_pattern) || '%') order by priority asc, ((case when object_type is null or object_type = '' or object_type in ('*','ANY') then 0 else 4 end) + (case when event_type is null or event_type = '' or event_type in ('*','ANY') then 0 else 4 end) + (case when error_code is null or error_code = '' or error_code in ('*','ANY') then 0 else 4 end) + (case when message_pattern is null or message_pattern = '' or message_pattern = '*' then 0 else 1 end)) desc, updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into agent_assignment_profiles ( tenant_id, profile_id, profile_code, profile_name, agent_type, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, description, allowed_task_types_json, allowed_issue_providers_json, required_runtime_features_json, tool_policy, risk_level_limit, requires_certification, requires_human_approval, is_active, policy_version, effective_at, expires_at, renewal_required_before_days, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{profile.tenantId}, #{profile.profileId}, #{profile.profileCode}, #{profile.profileName}, #{profile.agentType}, #{profile.taskDefinitionId}, #{profile.sourceSystem}, #{profile.taskType}, #{profile.description}, cast(#{profile.allowedTaskTypesJson} as jsonb), cast(#{profile.allowedIssueProvidersJson} as jsonb), cast(#{profile.requiredRuntimeFeaturesJson} as jsonb), #{profile.toolPolicy}, #{profile.riskLevelLimit}, #{profile.requiresCertification}, #{profile.requiresHumanApproval}, #{profile.active}, #{profile.policyVersion}, #{profile.effectiveAt}, #{profile.expiresAt}, #{profile.renewalRequiredBeforeDays}, coalesce(cast(#{profile.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{profile.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{profile.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, profile_code) do update set profile_name = excluded.profile_name, agent_type = excluded.agent_type, task_definition_id = excluded.task_definition_id, source_system = excluded.source_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, description = excluded.description, allowed_task_types_json = excluded.allowed_task_types_json, allowed_issue_providers_json = excluded.allowed_issue_providers_json, required_runtime_features_json = excluded.required_runtime_features_json, tool_policy = excluded.tool_policy, risk_level_limit = excluded.risk_level_limit, requires_certification = excluded.requires_certification, requires_human_approval = excluded.requires_human_approval, is_active = excluded.is_active, policy_version = excluded.policy_version, effective_at = excluded.effective_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, renewal_required_before_days = excluded.renewal_required_before_days, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.delete: delete from agent_assignment_profiles where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and profile_code = #{profileCode}
mapper.insert: insert into agent_capability_catalog ( tenant_id, capability_id, capability_code, capability_name, category, capability_type, domain, resource_type, operation, data_class, service_level, legacy_task_coupling, migration_status, description, task_definition_id, source_system, task_type, risk_level, status, version, owner_team, requires_approval, requires_certification, requires_runtime_probe, is_dispatch_eligible, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{capability.tenantId}, #{capability.capabilityId}, #{capability.capabilityCode}, #{capability.capabilityName}, #{capability.category}, #{capability.capabilityType}, #{capability.domain}, #{capability.resourceType}, #{capability.operation}, #{capability.dataClass}, #{capability.serviceLevel}, #{capability.legacyTaskCoupling}, #{capability.migrationStatus}, #{capability.description}, #{capability.taskDefinitionId}, #{capability.sourceSystem}, #{capability.taskType}, #{capability.riskLevel}, #{capability.status}, #{capability.version}, #{capability.ownerTeam}, #{capability.requiresApproval}, #{capability.requiresCertification}, #{capability.requiresRuntimeProbe}, #{capability.dispatchEligible}, #{capability.effectiveFrom}, #{capability.retiredAt}, coalesce(cast(#{capability.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{capability.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{capability.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, capability_code) do update set capability_name = excluded.capability_name, category = excluded.category, capability_type = excluded.capability_type, domain = excluded.domain, resource_type = excluded.resource_type, operation = excluded.operation, data_class = excluded.data_class, service_level = excluded.service_level, legacy_task_coupling = excluded.legacy_task_coupling, migration_status = excluded.migration_status, description = excluded.description, task_definition_id = excluded.task_definition_id, source_system = excluded.source_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, status = excluded.status, version = excluded.version, owner_team = excluded.owner_team, requires_approval = excluded.requires_approval, requires_certification = excluded.requires_certification, requires_runtime_probe = excluded.requires_runtime_probe, is_dispatch_eligible = excluded.is_dispatch_eligible, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, retired_at = excluded.retired_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into assignment_profile_capability_bindings ( tenant_id, binding_id, profile_code, capability_code, capability_name, binding_mode, is_required, is_active, priority, approval_status, condition_expr, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{binding.tenantId}, #{binding.bindingId}, #{binding.profileCode}, #{binding.capabilityCode}, #{binding.capabilityName}, #{binding.bindingMode}, #{binding.required}, #{binding.active}, #{binding.priority}, #{binding.approvalStatus}, #{binding.conditionExpr}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{binding.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{binding.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{binding.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, profile_code, capability_code) do update set capability_name = excluded.capability_name, binding_mode = excluded.binding_mode, is_required = excluded.is_required, is_active = excluded.is_active, priority = excluded.priority, approval_status = excluded.approval_status, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.delete: delete from assignment_profile_capability_bindings where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and profile_code = #{profileCode} and capability_code = #{capabilityCode}
mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_policies ( tenant_id, policy_id, policy_code, policy_name, description, owner_team, risk_level, status, version, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{policy.tenantId}, #{policy.policyId}, #{policy.policyCode}, #{policy.policyName}, #{policy.description}, #{policy.ownerTeam}, #{policy.riskLevel}, #{policy.status}, #{policy.version}, #{policy.effectiveFrom}, #{policy.retiredAt}, coalesce(cast(#{policy.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{policy.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{policy.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, policy_code) do update set policy_name = excluded.policy_name, description = excluded.description, owner_team = excluded.owner_team, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, status = excluded.status, version = excluded.version, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, retired_at = excluded.retired_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into dispatch_policy_scopes ( tenant_id, scope_id, policy_code, source_system, task_type, task_definition_id, risk_level, priority, condition_expr, is_active, priority_order, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{scope.tenantId}, #{scope.scopeId}, #{scope.policyCode}, #{scope.sourceSystem}, #{scope.taskType}, #{scope.taskDefinitionId}, #{scope.riskLevel}, #{scope.priority}, #{scope.conditionExpr}, #{scope.active}, #{scope.priorityOrder}, coalesce(cast(#{scope.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{scope.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{scope.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, scope_id) do update set policy_code = excluded.policy_code, source_system = excluded.source_system, task_type = excluded.task_type, task_definition_id = excluded.task_definition_id, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, priority = excluded.priority, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, is_active = excluded.is_active, priority_order = excluded.priority_order, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into dispatch_policy_required_capabilities ( tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, capability_code, capability_name, required_mode, min_version, condition_expr, is_blocking, priority, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{rule.tenantId}, #{rule.ruleId}, #{rule.policyCode}, #{rule.capabilityCode}, #{rule.capabilityName}, #{rule.requiredMode}, #{rule.minVersion}, #{rule.conditionExpr}, #{rule.blocking}, #{rule.priority}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{rule.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{rule.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{rule.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, rule_id) do update set policy_code = excluded.policy_code, capability_code = excluded.capability_code, capability_name = excluded.capability_name, required_mode = excluded.required_mode, min_version = excluded.min_version, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, is_blocking = excluded.is_blocking, priority = excluded.priority, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into dispatch_policy_required_runtime_features ( tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, feature_code, feature_name, trust_status, condition_expr, is_blocking, priority, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{rule.tenantId}, #{rule.ruleId}, #{rule.policyCode}, #{rule.featureCode}, #{rule.featureName}, #{rule.trustStatus}, #{rule.conditionExpr}, #{rule.blocking}, #{rule.priority}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{rule.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{rule.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{rule.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, rule_id) do update set policy_code = excluded.policy_code, feature_code = excluded.feature_code, feature_name = excluded.feature_name, trust_status = excluded.trust_status, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, is_blocking = excluded.is_blocking, priority = excluded.priority, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into dispatch_policy_quality_rules ( tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, metric_name, operator, threshold_value, metric_window, is_blocking, score_weight, condition_expr, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{rule.tenantId}, #{rule.ruleId}, #{rule.policyCode}, #{rule.metricName}, #{rule.operator}, #{rule.thresholdValue}, #{rule.metricWindow}, #{rule.blocking}, #{rule.scoreWeight}, #{rule.conditionExpr}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{rule.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{rule.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{rule.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, rule_id) do update set policy_code = excluded.policy_code, metric_name = excluded.metric_name, operator = excluded.operator, threshold_value = excluded.threshold_value, metric_window = excluded.metric_window, is_blocking = excluded.is_blocking, score_weight = excluded.score_weight, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into dispatch_policy_scoring_rules ( tenant_id, rule_id, policy_code, factor_name, weight, direction, condition_expr, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{rule.tenantId}, #{rule.ruleId}, #{rule.policyCode}, #{rule.factorName}, #{rule.weight}, #{rule.direction}, #{rule.conditionExpr}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{rule.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{rule.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{rule.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, rule_id) do update set policy_code = excluded.policy_code, factor_name = excluded.factor_name, weight = excluded.weight, direction = excluded.direction, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from dispatch_policy_scoring_rules where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and policy_code = #{policyCode} order by weight desc, factor_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into supply_profiles ( tenant_id, supply_profile_id, profile_code, profile_name, agent_id, runtime_binding_id, runtime_id, service_role, service_level, quality_grade, risk_limit, data_scope, capacity_policy, status, effective_from, expires_at, capability_snapshot_json, runtime_feature_snapshot_json, quality_snapshot_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{profile.tenantId}, #{profile.supplyProfileId}, #{profile.profileCode}, #{profile.profileName}, #{profile.agentId}, #{profile.runtimeBindingId}, #{profile.runtimeId}, #{profile.serviceRole}, #{profile.serviceLevel}, #{profile.qualityGrade}, #{profile.riskLimit}, #{profile.dataScope}, #{profile.capacityPolicy}, #{profile.status}, #{profile.effectiveFrom}, #{profile.expiresAt}, coalesce(cast(#{profile.capabilitySnapshotJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{profile.runtimeFeatureSnapshotJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{profile.qualitySnapshotJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{profile.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{profile.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{profile.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, profile_code) do update set profile_name = excluded.profile_name, agent_id = excluded.agent_id, runtime_binding_id = excluded.runtime_binding_id, runtime_id = excluded.runtime_id, service_role = excluded.service_role, service_level = excluded.service_level, quality_grade = excluded.quality_grade, risk_limit = excluded.risk_limit, data_scope = excluded.data_scope, capacity_policy = excluded.capacity_policy, status = excluded.status, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, capability_snapshot_json = excluded.capability_snapshot_json, runtime_feature_snapshot_json = excluded.runtime_feature_snapshot_json, quality_snapshot_json = excluded.quality_snapshot_json, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into runtime_resources ( tenant_id, runtime_id, runtime_code, runtime_name, runtime_type, connector_type, execution_host, environment, region, zone, trust_status, status, capacity_limit, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{resource.tenantId}, #{resource.runtimeId}, #{resource.runtimeCode}, #{resource.runtimeName}, #{resource.runtimeType}, #{resource.connectorType}, #{resource.executionHost}, #{resource.environment}, #{resource.region}, #{resource.zone}, #{resource.trustStatus}, #{resource.status}, #{resource.capacityLimit}, coalesce(cast(#{resource.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{resource.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{resource.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, runtime_id) do update set runtime_code = excluded.runtime_code, runtime_name = excluded.runtime_name, runtime_type = excluded.runtime_type, connector_type = excluded.connector_type, execution_host = excluded.execution_host, environment = excluded.environment, region = excluded.region, zone = excluded.zone, trust_status = excluded.trust_status, status = excluded.status, capacity_limit = excluded.capacity_limit, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from runtime_resources where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and runtime_code = #{runtimeCode} order by updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update agent_runtime_bindings set runtime_id = #{binding.runtimeId}, runtime_code = #{binding.runtimeCode}, binding_status = #{binding.bindingStatus}, verified_by = #{binding.verifiedBy}, verified_at = #{binding.verifiedAt}, approved_by = #{binding.approvedBy}, approved_at = #{binding.approvedAt}, effective_from = #{binding.effectiveFrom}, expires_at = #{binding.expiresAt}, capacity_limit = #{binding.capacityLimit}, region = #{binding.region}, zone = #{binding.zone}, data_scope = #{binding.dataScope}, risk_limit = #{binding.riskLimit}, metadata_json = coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{binding.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), updated_at = coalesce(#{binding.updatedAt}, now()) where tenant_id = #{binding.tenantId} and agent_id = #{binding.agentId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: insert into agent_runtime_bindings ( tenant_id, binding_id, agent_id, runtime_id, runtime_code, binding_status, verified_by, verified_at, approved_by, approved_at, effective_from, expires_at, capacity_limit, region, zone, data_scope, risk_limit, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{binding.tenantId}, #{binding.bindingId}, #{binding.agentId}, #{binding.runtimeId}, #{binding.runtimeCode}, #{binding.bindingStatus}, #{binding.verifiedBy}, #{binding.verifiedAt}, #{binding.approvedBy}, #{binding.approvedAt}, #{binding.effectiveFrom}, #{binding.expiresAt}, #{binding.capacityLimit}, #{binding.region}, #{binding.zone}, #{binding.dataScope}, #{binding.riskLimit}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{binding.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{binding.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{binding.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (binding_id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, agent_id = excluded.agent_id, runtime_id = excluded.runtime_id, runtime_code = excluded.runtime_code, binding_status = excluded.binding_status, verified_by = excluded.verified_by, verified_at = excluded.verified_at, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, capacity_limit = excluded.capacity_limit, region = excluded.region, zone = excluded.zone, data_scope = excluded.data_scope, risk_limit = excluded.risk_limit, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from agent_runtime_bindings where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and agent_id = #{agentId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE' and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= now()) and (expires_at is null or expires_at > now()) order by updated_at desc limit 1

select from agent_runtime_bindings where agent_id = #{agentId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE' and (effective_from is null or effective_from <= now()) and (expires_at is null or expires_at > now()) order by updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into runtime_feature_catalog ( tenant_id, feature_id, feature_code, feature_name, category, description, status, version, requires_probe, requires_trust_approval, is_dispatch_eligible, owner_team, effective_from, retired_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{feature.tenantId}, #{feature.featureId}, #{feature.featureCode}, #{feature.featureName}, #{feature.category}, #{feature.description}, #{feature.status}, #{feature.version}, #{feature.requiresProbe}, #{feature.requiresTrustApproval}, #{feature.dispatchEligible}, #{feature.ownerTeam}, #{feature.effectiveFrom}, #{feature.retiredAt}, coalesce(cast(#{feature.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{feature.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{feature.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, feature_code) do update set feature_name = excluded.feature_name, category = excluded.category, description = excluded.description, status = excluded.status, version = excluded.version, requires_probe = excluded.requires_probe, requires_trust_approval = excluded.requires_trust_approval, is_dispatch_eligible = excluded.is_dispatch_eligible, owner_team = excluded.owner_team, effective_from = excluded.effective_from, retired_at = excluded.retired_at, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into agent_runtime_feature_observations ( tenant_id, observation_id, agent_id, feature_code, feature_name, observed_value, source, probe_result, observed_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{observation.tenantId}, #{observation.observationId}, #{observation.agentId}, #{observation.featureCode}, #{observation.featureName}, #{observation.observedValue}, #{observation.source}, #{observation.probeResult}, #{observation.observedAt}, coalesce(cast(#{observation.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{observation.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{observation.updatedAt}, now()) )
mapper.select: select from agent_runtime_feature_observations where agent_id = #{agentId} order by observed_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into agent_runtime_feature_trust ( tenant_id, trust_id, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, feature_code, feature_name, trust_status, source, observed_at, verified_by, verified_at, trusted_by, trusted_at, revoked_by, revoked_at, expires_at, evidence_ref, reason, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{trust.tenantId}, #{trust.trustId}, #{trust.agentId}, #{trust.runtimeId}, #{trust.bindingId}, #{trust.featureCode}, #{trust.featureName}, #{trust.trustStatus}, #{trust.source}, #{trust.observedAt}, #{trust.verifiedBy}, #{trust.verifiedAt}, #{trust.trustedBy}, #{trust.trustedAt}, #{trust.revokedBy}, #{trust.revokedAt}, #{trust.expiresAt}, #{trust.evidenceRef}, #{trust.reason}, coalesce(cast(#{trust.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{trust.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{trust.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, agent_id, feature_code) do update set runtime_id = excluded.runtime_id, binding_id = excluded.binding_id, feature_name = excluded.feature_name, trust_status = excluded.trust_status, source = excluded.source, observed_at = excluded.observed_at, verified_by = excluded.verified_by, verified_at = excluded.verified_at, trusted_by = excluded.trusted_by, trusted_at = excluded.trusted_at, revoked_by = excluded.revoked_by, revoked_at = excluded.revoked_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, evidence_ref = excluded.evidence_ref, reason = excluded.reason, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from agent_runtime_feature_trust where agent_id = #{agentId} and feature_code = #{featureCode} order by updated_at desc limit 1
select from agent_runtime_feature_trust where agent_id = #{agentId} order by updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into agent_capability_assignments ( tenant_id, assignment_id, agent_id, capability_code, capability_name, status, source, requested_by, requested_at, approved_by, approved_at, revoked_by, revoked_at, expires_at, evidence_ref, reason, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{assignment.tenantId}, #{assignment.assignmentId}, #{assignment.agentId}, #{assignment.capabilityCode}, #{assignment.capabilityName}, #{assignment.status}, #{assignment.source}, #{assignment.requestedBy}, #{assignment.requestedAt}, #{assignment.approvedBy}, #{assignment.approvedAt}, #{assignment.revokedBy}, #{assignment.revokedAt}, #{assignment.expiresAt}, #{assignment.evidenceRef}, #{assignment.reason}, coalesce(cast(#{assignment.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{assignment.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{assignment.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, agent_id, capability_code) do update set capability_name = excluded.capability_name, status = excluded.status, source = excluded.source, requested_by = excluded.requested_by, requested_at = excluded.requested_at, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, revoked_by = excluded.revoked_by, revoked_at = excluded.revoked_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, evidence_ref = excluded.evidence_ref, reason = excluded.reason, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select from agent_capability_assignments where agent_id = #{agentId} order by updated_at desc
mapper.delete: delete from agent_capability_assignments where agent_id = #{agentId} and assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
mapper.insert: insert into agent_quality_metrics_daily ( tenant_id, metric_id, metric_date, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, supply_profile_id, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{metrics.tenantId}, #{metrics.metricId}, #{metrics.metricDate}, #{metrics.agentId}, #{metrics.runtimeId}, #{metrics.bindingId}, #{metrics.supplyProfileId}, #{metrics.successRate}, #{metrics.failureRate}, #{metrics.timeoutRate}, #{metrics.slaBreachRate}, #{metrics.avgAckLatencyMs}, #{metrics.avgCompletionLatencyMs}, #{metrics.recentFailureCount}, #{metrics.manualRating}, #{metrics.qualityGrade}, #{metrics.riskPenalty}, #{metrics.score}, #{metrics.sampleSize}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{metrics.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{metrics.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{metrics.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, metric_id) do update set success_rate = excluded.success_rate, failure_rate = excluded.failure_rate, timeout_rate = excluded.timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate = excluded.sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms = excluded.avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms = excluded.avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count = excluded.recent_failure_count, manual_rating = excluded.manual_rating, quality_grade = excluded.quality_grade, risk_penalty = excluded.risk_penalty, score = excluded.score, sample_size = excluded.sample_size, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into agent_quality_metrics_window ( tenant_id, metric_id, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, supply_profile_id, metric_window, window_start, window_end, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{metrics.tenantId}, #{metrics.metricId}, #{metrics.agentId}, #{metrics.runtimeId}, #{metrics.bindingId}, #{metrics.supplyProfileId}, #{metrics.metricWindow}, #{metrics.windowStart}, #{metrics.windowEnd}, #{metrics.successRate}, #{metrics.failureRate}, #{metrics.timeoutRate}, #{metrics.slaBreachRate}, #{metrics.avgAckLatencyMs}, #{metrics.avgCompletionLatencyMs}, #{metrics.recentFailureCount}, #{metrics.manualRating}, #{metrics.qualityGrade}, #{metrics.riskPenalty}, #{metrics.score}, #{metrics.sampleSize}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{metrics.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{metrics.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{metrics.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, metric_id) do update set window_start = excluded.window_start, window_end = excluded.window_end, success_rate = excluded.success_rate, failure_rate = excluded.failure_rate, timeout_rate = excluded.timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate = excluded.sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms = excluded.avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms = excluded.avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count = excluded.recent_failure_count, manual_rating = excluded.manual_rating, quality_grade = excluded.quality_grade, risk_penalty = excluded.risk_penalty, score = excluded.score, sample_size = excluded.sample_size, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into runtime_quality_metrics_daily ( tenant_id, metric_id, metric_date, runtime_id, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{metrics.tenantId}, #{metrics.metricId}, #{metrics.metricDate}, #{metrics.runtimeId}, #{metrics.successRate}, #{metrics.failureRate}, #{metrics.timeoutRate}, #{metrics.slaBreachRate}, #{metrics.avgAckLatencyMs}, #{metrics.avgCompletionLatencyMs}, #{metrics.recentFailureCount}, #{metrics.qualityGrade}, #{metrics.riskPenalty}, #{metrics.score}, #{metrics.sampleSize}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{metrics.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{metrics.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{metrics.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, metric_id) do update set success_rate = excluded.success_rate, failure_rate = excluded.failure_rate, timeout_rate = excluded.timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate = excluded.sla_breach_rate, quality_grade = excluded.quality_grade, score = excluded.score, sample_size = excluded.sample_size, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into supply_profile_quality_snapshot ( tenant_id, snapshot_id, supply_profile_id, profile_code, agent_id, runtime_id, binding_id, metric_window, success_rate, failure_rate, timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate, avg_ack_latency_ms, avg_completion_latency_ms, recent_failure_count, manual_rating, quality_grade, risk_penalty, score, sample_size, calculated_at, source, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{snapshot.tenantId}, #{snapshot.snapshotId}, #{snapshot.supplyProfileId}, #{snapshot.profileCode}, #{snapshot.agentId}, #{snapshot.runtimeId}, #{snapshot.bindingId}, #{snapshot.metricWindow}, #{snapshot.successRate}, #{snapshot.failureRate}, #{snapshot.timeoutRate}, #{snapshot.slaBreachRate}, #{snapshot.avgAckLatencyMs}, #{snapshot.avgCompletionLatencyMs}, #{snapshot.recentFailureCount}, #{snapshot.manualRating}, #{snapshot.qualityGrade}, #{snapshot.riskPenalty}, #{snapshot.score}, #{snapshot.sampleSize}, coalesce(#{snapshot.calculatedAt}, now()), #{snapshot.source}, coalesce(cast(#{snapshot.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{snapshot.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{snapshot.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, snapshot_id) do update set success_rate = excluded.success_rate, failure_rate = excluded.failure_rate, timeout_rate = excluded.timeout_rate, sla_breach_rate = excluded.sla_breach_rate, recent_failure_count = excluded.recent_failure_count, manual_rating = excluded.manual_rating, quality_grade = excluded.quality_grade, risk_penalty = excluded.risk_penalty, score = excluded.score, sample_size = excluded.sample_size, calculated_at = excluded.calculated_at, source = excluded.source, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()

insert into agent_assignment_profile_policy_bindings ( tenant_id, binding_id, profile_code, policy_code, policy_name, binding_mode, is_required, is_active, priority, condition_expr, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{binding.tenantId}, #{binding.bindingId}, #{binding.profileCode}, #{binding.policyCode}, #{binding.policyName}, #{binding.bindingMode}, #{binding.required}, #{binding.active}, #{binding.priority}, #{binding.conditionExpr}, coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{binding.metadataJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(#{binding.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{binding.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (tenant_id, profile_code, policy_code) do update set policy_name = excluded.policy_name, binding_mode = excluded.binding_mode, is_required = excluded.is_required, is_active = excluded.is_active, priority = excluded.priority, condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.delete: delete from agent_assignment_profile_policy_bindings where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and profile_code = #{profileCode} and policy_code = #{policyCode}
mapper.insert: insert into agent_qualifications ( tenant_id, qualification_id, agent_id, profile_code, qualification_status, evidence_type, evidence_ref, approved_by, approved_at, expires_at, granted_policy_version, last_renewed_at, renewal_due_at, renewal_status, reason, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{qualification.tenantId}, #{qualification.qualificationId}, #{qualification.agentId}, #{qualification.profileCode}, #{qualification.qualificationStatus}, #{qualification.evidenceType}, #{qualification.evidenceRef}, #{qualification.approvedBy}, #{qualification.approvedAt}, #{qualification.expiresAt}, #{qualification.grantedPolicyVersion}, #{qualification.lastRenewedAt}, #{qualification.renewalDueAt}, #{qualification.renewalStatus}, #{qualification.reason}, cast(#{qualification.metadataJson} as jsonb), coalesce(#{qualification.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{qualification.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (qualification_id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, agent_id = excluded.agent_id, profile_code = excluded.profile_code, qualification_status = excluded.qualification_status, evidence_type = excluded.evidence_type, evidence_ref = excluded.evidence_ref, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, granted_policy_version = excluded.granted_policy_version, last_renewed_at = excluded.last_renewed_at, renewal_due_at = excluded.renewal_due_at, renewal_status = excluded.renewal_status, reason = excluded.reason, metadata_json = excluded.metadata_json, updated_at = now()
mapper.delete: delete from agent_qualifications where agent_id = #{agentId} and qualification_id = #{qualificationId}
mapper.select: select from agent_qualifications where agent_id = #{agentId} and profile_code = #{profileCode} order by updated_at desc limit 1
select from agent_qualifications where agent_id = #{agentId} order by updated_at desc
select from agent_qualifications where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and profile_code = #{profileCode} order by updated_at desc
